pi_items.verified_value: Supreme Court of the United States

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims reference the landmark Supreme Court case Roe v. Wade. The case was correctly decided on January 22, 1973, and is cited as 410 U.S. 113 (1973). The court is the Supreme Court of the United States, the reporter is U.S. Reports (abbreviated U.S.), the volume is 410, and the first page is 113. These are real, historically accurate details from official Library of Congress records, not synthetic data.
